title: Add dynamic value from formula column in Monday doc

Description
We have the option to populate a Monday doc with board item values, but this doesn’t work if the board item is a formula. If you try to populate a Monday doc with a item value that is a formula you just get “…

posts.author: klm170 (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have the option to populate a Monday doc with board item values, but this doesn’t work if the board item is a formula. If you try to populate a Monday doc with a item value that is a formula you just get “null”

Need this function to also work with formula values. Should bring in the text string output from the formula into the Monday doc.

What are you trying to achieve

See formula outputs in the Monday doc.
